pi_items.source: task.json description (line 8) specifies save location; export_result.sh (line 6) BLEND_FILE variable confirms identical path; setup_task.sh uses PROJECTS_DIR="/home/ga/BlenderProjects"
task.json description (line 9) specifies render output location; export_result.sh (line 7) RENDER_FILE variable confirms identical path
task.json description (line 5) specifies '10x10 subdivisions (100+ vertices)'; verifier.py (line 84) checks 'if vertex_count >= 100' for full 10-point score

task.json metadata field claims 0.01, but verifier.py line 111 uses 'if z_variance > 0.005' for full 20-point score (line 112: score += 20); export_result.sh line 118 uses same 0.005 threshold. The metadata value contradicts the actual implementation threshold.

task.json metadata field specifies 'CLOTH'; export_result.sh line 86 checks 'if mod.type == "CLOTH"'; verifier.py line 86 checks same condition; task description (line 2) requires 'Apply Cloth physics'

task.json metadata field specifies 'COLLISION'; export_result.sh line 122 checks 'if mod.type == "COLLISION"'; verifier.py checks for collision on TableTop and Ground; task description (lines 3-4) requires 'Apply Collision physics'

privileged_info_summary: The task is a Blender-based cloth drape simulation with 100% synthetic data (procedurally generated scene, no external datasets). Verified facts: (1) Expected blend file output: /home/ga/BlenderProjects/cloth_drape.blend; (2) Expected render image output: /home/ga/BlenderProjects/cloth_render.png; (3) Cloth mesh requires minimum 100 vertices; (4) Requires CLOTH modifier on cloth object and COLLISION modifiers on table and ground objects; (5) Z-variance deformation threshold for full credit: 0.005 (contradicting metadata claim of 0.01).
